title: Tick Control in Summit, NJ
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Summit, NJ starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from ticks with expert extermination. Same-day service available.
intro: Summit, New Jersey residents face increasing tick populations due to the area's lush parks, wooded properties, and proximity to the Watchung Reservation. Our professional tick control services protect Summit families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with comprehensive treatment plans tailored to your property. Whether you live near downtown Summit or in the surrounding residential neighborhoods, we provide effective tick extermination starting at just $125.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Summit and surrounding New Jersey communities with safe, EPA-approved tick treatments. Our licensed technicians understand Summit's unique landscape and deliver fast, reliable service with same-day appointments available for urgent tick problems.
localContext: Summit's beautiful tree-lined streets, historic properties, and proximity to green spaces like Briant Park and Reeves-Reed Arboretum create ideal habitats for ticks. Our treatments are specifically designed for Summit's mix of vintage homes with expansive lawns and modern properties backing onto wooded areas, ensuring comprehensive protection throughout the growing season.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Summit, NJ?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Summit typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active whenever temperatures are above freezing, so year-round vigilance is important in our area.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Summit?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Summit range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer single treatments as well as seasonal packages with multiple applications for complete protection.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for children and pets in Summit?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children off treated areas for 2-4 hours until the application dries, then the area is completely safe for normal use.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide tick control service in Summit?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day tick control services throughout Summit, NJ. Simply call us in the morning, and in most cases, we can have a technician at your property the same afternoon to begin treatment and protect your family from tick exposure.
